title: SiTime 88% Revenue Surge - Precision Timing Role in AI Infrastructure
text: SiTime's 88% revenue surge in Q1 2026 signals precision timing's new strategic role in AI infrastructure. The company's differentiated platforms are driving higher average selling prices, stronger margins, and deeper customer engagement in the AI ecosystem. SiTime's timing solutions are increasingly becoming critical at the system-level for AI data center architectures. The company's $4 billion serviceable addressable market opportunity in precision timing within the $11 billion total available market positions it well for continued expansion. Strategic expansion into AI-specific products like the Elite 2 Super-TCXO demonstrates the company's commitment to capturing the growing demand for precision timing in AI infrastructure.
